info.name: EverMagic
info.description:
Trigger and test all EverMagic n8n workflows.

Variables to set in your environment:
- `base_url`  → https://evermagic.app.n8n.cloud/webhook  (live)
               → https://evermagic.app.n8n.cloud/webhook-test  (test mode)
- `token`     → your X-EverMagic-Token value
- `order_id`  → order ID to act on (e.g. EM-20260313-T7T8)

item.name: 1. Intake
item.description: Simulate a Tally form submission to create a new order and kick off script generation.

request.description:
Simulates a Tally webhook. Creates the order, runs GPT script generation, emails admin.

Expected: 200 OK. Check Supabase `orders` table for new row with status `script_generated`.

item.name: 2. Review
item.description: Admin review actions — view script, approve, retry, or edit.

request.description: Opens the admin review HTML page for an order. Change `action` to `approve`, `retry`, or `edit`.

Approves the script. Order moves to `approved` status and triggers image generation.

Note: action field uses `retry_submit` / `edit_submit` naming from n8n workflow.
Re-generates the script with feedback. Increments version, old script marked superseded.
Saves manually edited script content. Replaces script in DB without re-generating.

item.name: 3. Image Generation
item.description: Trigger image generation for an approved order.

request.description:
Starts image generation for an order with status `approved`.

Generates 12 images (cover + 5 scenes + 5 coloring + 1 spare). Takes ~3–4 minutes.
Expected: order moves to `images_generating` then `images_generated`.

item.name: 4. Scenario Expansion
item.description: Expand the approved script with richer narrative before PDF assembly.

request.description:
Expands the approved script with detailed scene narratives.
Order must have status `images_generated`.
Expected: order moves to `scenario_expanding` then `scenario_expanded`, then automatically triggers PDF generation.

item.name: 5. PDF Assembly
item.description: Generate the 3 PDFs (storybook, coloring book, certificate) for an order.

request.description:
Generates storybook PDF (7×7in), coloring book PDF (Letter), and certificate PDF (Letter landscape).
Order must have status `scenario_expanded`.
Expected: order moves to `pdf_generating` then `pdf_generated`. PDFs uploaded to Supabase Storage.
